title: King Prawn and Savory Crumble
description: A flavorful combination of king prawns, savory goodness, and crunchy texture, all wrapped up in a delicious Dutch-inspired crumble.
instructions: Season the king prawns with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the prawns and cook until pink and just cooked through.
In a separate bowl, mix the savory, crunchy, and Dutch cheese.
Add the cooked prawns to the bowl and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Top with the savory crumble mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
